subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Thee, O Thou Who art the Lord of the heavenly kingdom and Sovereign of the celestial dominion! I beseech Thee by Thy Name
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا مولی الملکوت و مالک الجبروت اسئلک باسمک الذی به اقمت القیامة و اظهرت اسرارها
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
